HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SPEAK ON BEHALF OF THE AK PARTY GROUP (Mersin) - Mr. President, dear members of parliament; First of all, I condemn the vile words of the Israeli Foreign Minister, the hitman of Gaza butcher Netanyahu, targeting our President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, who defends human values ​​and peace. No threat can divert Türkiye from its path, no one can threaten the President of the Republic of Türkiye.

AYSU BANKOĞLU (Bartın) - But it can kill animals. It cannot threaten, but it can kill animals.

HAVVA SIBEL SÖYLEMEZ (Continue) - Dear MPs, I have taken the floor on behalf of the AK Party Group on the Bill on Amendments to the Animal Protection Law.

We are gathered here today to talk about the issue of stray dogs, which deeply hurts our hearts and aches the conscience of all of us. Maybe these folders full of legal articles will not mean anything to you and you will do your duty to oppose them. Please, I ask you to think with your human feelings, not as a political individual. Today, I want to address you and the hearts of our beloved nation.

AYSU BANKOĞLU (Bartın) - Do you have any human feelings?

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continued) - I am calling out to you as a mother and a citizen under the umbrella of our Gazi Assembly. I want to call out to those who close their hearts and conscience in the name of political concern.

AYSU BANKOĞLU (Bartın) - You are the one without a heart, you are the one without a heart. You are the one who leaves animals to die. You are the one who will kill the animals. And you're talking about the heart and emotions, come on! Do you have a heart?

HAVVA SİBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continue) - I just want to address the associations with "animal protection" in their name. I would like to call out to so-called rights defenders who are trying to manage perception in the digital world.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - How much did you spend on trolls?

HAVVA SIBEL SÖYLEMEZ (Continue) - In Ankara, 8-year-old Tunahan Yılmaz was on his way to school...

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - What time did she go to school? Was it bright?

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continue) - ...in Muş, 55-year-old Sefer Kül was going to the mosque to perform the morning prayer...

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Why was that child going to school in the dark?

HAVVA SIBEL SÖYLEMEZ (Continued) - ...While our 74-year-old Aunt Zehra was sitting in the garden of her apartment building in Edirne...

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - While not sterilizing the animals or building shelters...

HAVVA SIBEL SÖYLEMEZ (Continued) - ...25-year-old Hatice Ağır in Istanbul is one of those who were attacked by stray dogs on her way to work.

AYSU BANKOĞLU (BARTIN) - You are not ashamed, you defend. You defend death, death!

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Why didn't you prevent it all this time?

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continue) - Please remember 9-year-old Mahra Melin Pınar in Antalya.

AYSU BANKOĞLU (BARTIN) - You are defending death.

PERIHAN KOCA (Mersin) - They still abuse children!

HAVVA SIBEL SÖYLEMEZ (Continued) - She lost her life tragically after being hit by a truck while trying to escape from stray dogs.

PERIHAN KOCA (Mersin) - Stop abuse, stop abusing children! Stop abusing children!

AYSU BANKOĞLU (BARTIN) - You are defending death, death.

HAVVA SIBEL SÖYLEMEZ (Continue) - Again, in Bitlis Adilcevaz, 10-year-old Mustafa Erçetin died painfully in the hospital due to rabies after a dog attack.

AYSU BANKOĞLU (BARTIN) - Who has been in power for twenty years? Why didn't you neuter?

PERIHAN KOCA (Mersin) - Who, who is responsible for them? Who is responsible for them?

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continue) - Hundreds of names can be added to these names. I call out to all the mothers listening to us here.

AYSU BANKOĞLU (BARTIN) - Come on!

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continued) - What would we do if such a disaster happened to your own child?

AYSU BANKOĞLU (BARTIN) - Shame on you! Shame on you!

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continued) - Will we not hear the voices of the mothers who experience this pain?

PERIHAN KOCA (Mersin) - What did you do, by the way, what did you do? What have you done other than exploiting them?

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continued) - It is impossible to describe in words the pain experienced by a mother who lost her child. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

AYSU BANKOĞLU (BARTIN) - I am ashamed of your motherhood, I am ashamed!

PERIHAN KOCA (Mersin) - What have you done other than exploiting them, President, using their pain?

AYSU BANKOĞLU (BARTIN) - Shame on you! You defend death, death.

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continued) - Think of the pain in her heart and the tears she shed at her child's grave.

AYSU BANKOĞLU (BARTIN) - You are defending death, death.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Thousands of mothers lost their children, thousands of children were abused, you did not say a word.

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continued) - No mother, no father should ever experience such pain again.

PERIHAN KOCA (Mersin) - Stop abusing children!

MEHMET TAHTASIZ (Çorum) - All the suffering happened under your rule.

AYSU BANKOĞLU (BARTIN) - You are a mother who defends death, who defends death!

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continued) - We cannot remain indifferent to the tears and heartbreaking screams of these mothers.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - People you starve, people you leave unsafe, people you kill with earthquakes, people you leave alone with abuse...

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continue) - Stray stray dogs, especially children...

PERIHAN KOCA (Mersin) - They also talk about mercy to us!

MEHMET TAHTAZIZ (Çorum) - Do not blame the pain that is in your power on someone else.

AYSU BANKOĞLU (BARTIN) - You defend death, you are a mother who defends death.

HAVVA SIBEL SAYLEMEZ (Continued) - ...it restricts the daily lives of all our people, including the elderly, the disabled and women, and has become a social problem that needs to be solved urgently. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - You left everyone alone.

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continued) - Please, stop trying to be against everything.

PERIHAN KOCA (Mersin) - Come on!

MEHMET TAHTASIZ (Çorum) - Young people died in the elevator, young people were burned in courses, young people were raped in sect nests.

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continued) - Stop being insensitive to this problem of our nation.

MEHMET TAHTASIZ (Çorum) - Young people died with electricity.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Lies have nestled in your mouth, lies!

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continue) - By the way, I call out to the defenders of the terrorist organization who call the deputies in our Gazi Parliament "murderers" during the commission discussions.

MEHMET TAHTASIZ (Çorum) - All of this happened under your rule.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - You are the "terrorist", you are the "terrorist".

AYSU BANKOĞLU (BARTIN) - You are a murderer, a murderer!

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continued) - Could you call the terrorist organization that treacherously murdered thousands of our children, women, elderly, soldiers, police, and thousands of lives, even for a single day, as a "murderer"? You can't say that because you get instructions from there. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Do you have anything else to say!

PERIHAN KOCA (Mersin) - You are the real terrorist! You are the terrorist! You have gone down in history as those who signed the massacre decree!

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continued) - Yes, dear MPs, human life is our most valuable asset.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Can you talk about terrorism without talking about it? Can you talk about it without saying "terrorism"? Can you speak without written text? Can you speak without written text?

HÜSEYİN ALTINSOY (Aksaray) - Oh, shut up and let's listen, orator!

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continued) - Calm, calm, calm...

Now I am calling out to the opposing consciences: Bring before your eyes your 10-year-old son Mustafa, who died in pain due to rabies after being bitten by a stray dog in Bitlis, bring before your eyes our puppy Tunahan.

MEHMET TAHTAZIZ (Çorum) - They are our pain, but you caused them.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Can you talk without saying "terrorism"? Can you talk to children without exploiting them?

PERIHAN KOCA (Mersin) - Stop abusing! Stop the abuse!

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Have some shame! If you had this much shame, you wouldn't be able to speak!

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continue) - Mustafa, if Tunahan were your child, if you were the one who got hurt in the attack of the stray dogs, could you remain so deaf and unresponsive to the cries of the mothers of these children? (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

MEHMET TAHTAZIZ (Çorum) - Those children are our children. If you had done your duty, nothing would have happened to those children.

PERIHAN KOCA (Mersin) - You are lying shamelessly!

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - What did you worry about that was not profitable? What did you worry about that you couldn't make a profit from? What did you worry about that you didn't make money from?

HAVVA SIBEL SAYLEMEZ (Continue) - Just a month ago, in my constituency Mersin, our mother Perihan Çiğdem swerved to avoid hitting the dog in front of the car she was driving and had an accident, and 12-year-old little Ceylin, who was in the car, passed away. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Very nice, applaud the feeling!

MEHMET THTASIZ (Çorum) - If you had vaccinated the dogs and neutered them, those children would not have died.

HAVVA SİBEL SÖYLEMEZ (Continued) - While preparing the law, we listened to all segments of the society, shared their pain and tried to make the best regulation for the safety of everyone.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Lie, lie, lie!

PERIHAN KOCA (Mersin) - Who did you listen to! It's all lies!

MEHMET TAHTASIZ (Çorum) - There was a law in 2004, you did not implement it.

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continue) - The purpose of this regulation is to protect both our people and our animals. The safety of every living creature is our priority. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

AYSU BANKOĞLU (Bartın) - What kind of protection, you are killing him!

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - You held secret workshops, secretly. You held the workshop secretly. You kept the workshop results. You officially did it with MIT. Is this the Ministry or MIT?

HAVVA SİBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continue) - I would like to express a speech of our esteemed President here. "Every human being is valuable by nature and this value cannot be measured by anything. We are a nation that prioritizes human honor and dignity above all else."

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - The Ministry hid why it held a workshop two years ago!

AYSU BANKOĞLU (Bartın) - Your hands are bloody! Your hands are bloody, bloody! You will kill the dogs! Your hands are bloody!

HAVVA SIBEL SAYLEMEZ (Continue) - "Each of our citizens is an equal and valuable individual of this country, regardless of their identity, belief or ethnic origin. (Applause from the AK PARTY ranks) Humanity is built on mercy and justice. In our culture and belief, 'Let the people live so that the state can live.' There is an understanding."

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Everyone is equal, AKP members are more equal.

HAVVA SIBEL SÖYLEMEZ (Continued) - "The peace and welfare of every individual living in these lands is our highest priority."

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Everyone living in these lands are people you will exploit. You know nothing but exploiting

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continued) - "We should not allow anyone to feel alone, excluded or worthless."

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - You value each other very much, yes! You care about each other very much, but two years later you say, "We were deceived." you will say.

HAVVA SIBEL SAYLEMEZ (Continued) - "Each of our citizens is a value and wealth for us."

MEHMET TAHTASIZ (Çorum) - Where were you when unassigned teachers were dying in construction! Where were you when children who had to work at the age of 15 were dying?

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continue) - "Let's not forget that we are a nation under the same sky, sharing the same hopes and desiring the same future. We must embrace each other more and support each other more in order to be a strong, peaceful and happy society together."

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Believe a little bit of this speech, a little bit of it!

HAVVA SIBEL SÖYLEMEZ (Continued) - "Respecting the dignity of every human being is our most basic human duty."

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - The people don't believe it, and you don't believe it yourself! You are not fooling anyone!

MEHMET TAHTAZIZ (Çorum) - Where are you when people commit suicide because they are honorable, because they cannot find a job!

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continued) - "You are very valuable to us; your happiness is our happiness; your peace is our peace; your success is our success; your pain is our pain." (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Lie, lie!

HAVVA SIBEL SÖYLEMEZ (Continued) - "Together we will reach a better tomorrow, we will be stronger together." he said.

MEHMET TAHTAZIZ (Çorum) - All pains are common.

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continued) - This is exactly where we stand on this law. I would like to remind you again about the peace and welfare of the society in the text we swore under the roof of our Gazi Assembly. ("Bravo" sounds and applause from the AK PARTY rows; noises from the DEM PARTY rows)

MEHMET TAHTASIZ (Çorum) - Yes, we swore on our honor and dignity to abide by the Constitution, but you did not faithfully adhere to the Constitution, you tore up the decision of the Constitutional Court.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - You have eaten the welfare of the society, you have eaten its peace; There is no peace or welfare of the society!

HAVVA SIBEL SAYLEMEZ (Continues) - Our aim is...

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - To massacre, just to massacre.

HAVVA SIBEL SAYLEMEZ (Continued) - ...to rehabilitate animals that live in unhealthy conditions on the streets, often suffer from hunger and cold, and cause accidents and get injured, and save them from the streets.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - What you understand by rehabilitation is murder. We know all your actions, you have done nothing for the benefit of society.

HAVVA SIBEL SÖYLEMEZ (Continue) - To increase the facilities and capacity of nursing homes by ensuring that municipalities take more responsibility.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - You have done nothing for the benefit of this people. You want chaos, you want blood!

HAVVA SİBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continue) - Stray animals will be kept in these nursing homes, campaigns will be organized for their adoption, the adopted animals will be neutered, vaccinated, chipped and delivered to their owners.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - What will happen to those who are not adopted? Come on, tell him! You openly say that you will kill those who are not adopted.

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continue) - Later, they will be followed very closely to ensure that they are not thrown into the streets.

In this regard, with our proposed law, we aim to eliminate the risks to human, animal and environmental health by controlling the stray animal population.

KEZİBAN KONUKCU KOK (Istanbul) - 85 percent of the society is against this law.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Massacre was never the solution, massacre was never the solution.

HAVVA SIBEL SAYLEMEZ (Continued) - This law is of great importance for the future of our society. (Sounds of "Bravo" and applause from the AK PARTY benches)

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - Because this law is a dynamite thrown into the future of society. You are dynamiting the future with this law.

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continue) - Dear MPs, it is a humanitarian duty for all of us to support this bill, we must take these steps to leave a safer and more peaceful Türkiye to our children.

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - This is one of your steps to destroy the future.

HAVVA SIBEL DOES NOT SAY (Continued) - On this occasion, I wish patience and fortitude to all our mothers who lost their children. No new Mahras, no new Tunahans...

BURCUGÜL ÇUBUK (İzmir) - It happens under your power, your government makes these things happen again.
